act_1_step_1.title: Defeat The Bloated Miller
act_1_step_1.description: Begin your journey by defeating The Bloated Miller in The Riverbank to gain access to the next area.

objectives.text: Find and kill The Bloated Miller
objectives.details: Killing The Bloated Miller grans you access to the next area.

act_1_step_2.title: Enter Clearfell
act_1_step_2.description: Enter Clearfell to continue your progression through Act 1.

objectives.text: Enter Clearfell

act_1_step_3.title: Clear Clearfell and Find The Grelwood
act_1_step_3.description: Defeat Beira of the Rotten Pack and locate the exit to The Grelwood. Optionally find the Mysterious Campsite for additional rewards.

objectives.text: Find and kill Beira of the Rotten Pack
objectives.details: Always located to the North/Northest of the Waypoint.

objectives.text: Find the exit to The Grelwood
objectives.notes: If you find the exit to The Grelwood first, keep looking for Beira of the Rotten Pack. Then use the checkpoint to return to the exit.

objectives.text: Find the Mysterious Campsite

act_1_step_4.title: Explore The Grelwood and Find Red Vale
act_1_step_4.description: Talk to Una, discover exits to The Grim Tangle and Red Vale, and complete optional encounters with Brambleghast and the Witch Hut.

objectives.text: Find the waypoint and talk to Una
objectives.details: Una is located near the center of the zone.

objectives.text: Find the exit to The Grim Tangle
objectives.details: Enter the zone, activate the waypoint and return to The Grelwood.

objectives.text: Find the exit to The Red Vale
objectives.details: If you've already discovered the waypoint and the exit to The Grim Tangle proceed to The Red Vale. Otherwise, backtrack and complete other objectives.

objectives.text: Find and kill Brambleghast
Find the Cauldron in the Witch Hut
objectives.details: Defeat the witch and loot the cauldron.

act_1_step_5.title: Complete Red Vale Obelisks and Defeat The Rust King
act_1_step_5.description: Complete the three obelisks in Red Vale, defeat The Rust King, and collect the required quest items before returning to Clearfell Encampment.

objectives.text: Find and complete the three obelisks and defeat The Rust King, obtain quest items, then return to Clearfell Encampment
objectives.details: Pick up the the Runed Girdle, Runed Guard, and the Runed Skull Cap when each obelisk is completed.

act_1_step_6.title: Obtain Runic Tools from Renly
act_1_step_6.description: Speak with Renly to obtain the Runic Tools quest item, then use the waypoint to return to The Grelwood.

objectives.text: Talk to Renly to obtain the Runic Tools quest item
Use the waypoint to return to The Grelwood.

act_1_step_7.title: Complete Runic Ritual in The Grelwood
act_1_step_7.description: Use the Runic Tools to impale the spikes on the three runes on the tree roots, then speak with Una before returning to Clearfell Encampment.

objectives.text: Empale the spikes on the three runes on the tree roots. Then talk to Una.
Return to Clearfell Encampment

act_1_step_8.title: Travel to The Grim Tangle
act_1_step_8.description: Speak with Una and take the waypoint to The Grim Tangle to continue your journey.

objectives.text: Talk to Una
Take the waypoint to The Grim Tangle

act_1_step_9.title: Navigate The Grim Tangle to Cemetery
act_1_step_9.description: Find the exit to Cemetery of the Eternals and optionally defeat The Rotten Druid for additional rewards.

objectives.text: Find the exit to Cemetary of the Eternals
Find and kill The Rotten Druid

act_1_step_10.title: Defeat Praetor and Consort in Cemetery
act_1_step_10.description: Defeat Draven, the Eternal Praetor and Asinia, the Praetor's Consort, then unlock the gate and defeat Lachlann of Endless Lament to proceed to Hunting Grounds.

objectives.text: Find the Mausoleum of the Praetor and kill Draven, the Eternal Praetor
objectives.details: Pick up dropped quest items from the Praetor.

objectives.text: Find the Tomb of the Consort and kill Asinia, the Praetor's Consort
objectives.details: Pick up dropped quest items from the Consort.
objectives.notes: If both Asinia and Draven have been killed, use checkpoint to teleport to the beginning of the zone. Then use the waypoint to return to the Cemetary of the Eternals.

objectives.text: Unlock the gate, follow the NPC then kill Lachlann of Endless Lament
objectives.details: After defeating Lachlan, enter Hunting Grounds.

act_1_step_11.title: Explore Hunting Grounds and Find Exits
act_1_step_11.description: Find Crowbell for skill points, discover exits to Freythorn and Ogham Farmlands, and complete optional encounters including the Ritual Site and Dryad Encounter.

objectives.text: Find and Crowbell
Find the exit to Freythorn
objectives.details: Enter zone, take waypoint, then return to Hunting Grounds.
objectives.notes: If you've already discovered Ogham Farmlands, move to the next step.

objectives.text: Find the exit to Ogham Farmlands
objectives.details: Enter zone, take waypoint, then return to Hunting Grounds.
objectives.notes: If you've already discovered Freythorn, take the Ogham Farmlands wayoint to Freythorn.

objectives.text: Find and complete the Ritual Site
objectives.notes: If you've already discovered Ogham Farmlands, take the Ogham Village wayoint to Ogham Farmlands.

objectives.text: Find and complete the Dryad Encounter

act_1_step_12.title: Complete Rituals and Defeat The King in the Mists
act_1_step_12.description: Perform all four rituals in Freythorn and defeat The King in the Mists on the fourth ritual, then proceed to Ogham Farmlands.

objectives.text: Perform all 4 rituals and kill The King in the Mists on the 4th ritual
objectives.details: After killing The King in the Mists, enter Ogham Farmlands by portaling to town then use the waypoint

act_1_step_13.title: Find Una's Lute and Enter Ogham Village
act_1_step_13.description: Locate Una's Lute in Ogham Farmlands, find and enter Ogham Village, and optionally defeat the rare monster in the Crop Circle.

objectives.text: Find Una's Lute
objectives.details: Located in a hut near the center of the zone.

objectives.text: Find and enter Ogham Village
Find the Crop Circle and kill the rare monter

act_1_step_14.title: Obtain Smithing Tools and Defeat The Executioner
act_1_step_14.description: Find the Smithing Tools to unlock the Salvage Bench, defeat The Executioner, and enter The Manor Ramparts.

objectives.text: Find Smithing Tools
objectives.notes: This only needs to be completed on your first character per league.

objectives.text: Find and kill The Executioner
Enter The Manor Ramparts

act_1_step_15.title: Enter Ogham Manor and Find Gallows
act_1_step_15.description: Enter Ogham Manor and find the gallows for a skill gem reward.

objectives.text: Find and enter Ogham Manor
Find the gallows for reward

act_1_step_16.title: Defeat Manor Bosses and Return to Clearfell
act_1_step_16.description: Defeat Candlemass, the Living Rite on the first floor, then find and defeat Count Geonor on the second floor before returning to Clearfell Encampment.

objectives.text: Find and kill Candlemass, the Living Rite
objectives.details: Candlemass is found on the first floor of the manor.
objectives.notes: If you find the second floor first, enter it take the check point, then return. After killing Candlemass use the checkpoint to return to floor 2.

objectives.text: Find and kill Count Geonor then return to Clearfell Encampment

act_1_step_17.title: Complete Act 1 and Depart for Act 2
act_1_step_17.description: Speak with all important NPCs (Una, The Hooded One, and Renly), then talk to The Hooded One to depart for Act 2 and travel to Vastiri Outskirts.

objectives.text: Talk to important NPCs
objectives.details: Talk to Una, The Hooded One, and Renly

objectives.text: Talk to The Hooded One to depart for act 2

act_2_step_1.title: Defeat Rathbreaker and Enter The Ardura Caravan
act_2_step_1.description: Begin Act 2 by finding and defeating Rathbreaker in Vastiri Outskirts, then portal back to camp and enter The Ardura Caravan.

objectives.text: Find and kill Rathbreaker
Portal back to camp, enter The Ardura Caravan
objectives.details: Can also go ESC - respawn at checkpoint

act_2_step_2.title: Speak with NPCs and Travel to Mawdun Quarry
act_2_step_2.description: Speak to everyone in The Ardura Caravan and use the desert map to go to Mawdun Quarry.

objectives.text: Speak to everyone in The Ardura Caravan
Use desert map to go to Mawdun Quarry

act_2_step_3.title: Find Exit to Mawdun Mine
act_2_step_3.description: Navigate Mawdun Quarry and find the exit to Mawdun Mine, following the checkpoints.

objectives.text: Find exit to Mawdun Mine
objectives.details: Follow the checkpoints

act_2_step_4.title: Defeat Rudja in Mawdun Mine
act_2_step_4.description: Find and defeat Rudja in Mawdun Mine, then speak with Risu and portal back to town.

objectives.text: Find and kill Rudja
Talk to Risu, portal back to town

act_2_step_5.title: Speak with Risu and Travel to Halani Gates
act_2_step_5.description: Talk to Risu, then use the desert map to go to Halani Gates.

objectives.text: Talk to Risu, then use desert map to go to Halani Gates

act_2_step_6.title: Speak with Asala and Travel to Traitor's Passage
act_2_step_6.description: Talk to Asala at the gates, go back to The Ardura Caravan, talk to Risu again, then to Asala again, then use desert map to go to Traitor's Passage.

objectives.text: Talk to Asala at the gates, go back to The Ardura Caravan, talk to Risu again, then to Asala again
Use desert map to go to Traitor's Passage

act_2_step_7.title: Defeat Basala and Find Exit to Halani Gates
act_2_step_7.description: Find and defeat Basala, pick up the Djinn Barya quest item, then find the exit to the Halani Gates.

objectives.text: Find and kill Basala, pick up the Djinn Barya quest item
objectives.details: If you find paper on the walls, you are close

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Halani Gates
objectives.details: Stairs up means you are on the right way

objectives.text: Find and loot the Bell Chest
objectives.details: It's in a dead end with a checkpoint, some monsters and already dropped gold on the ground

act_2_step_8.title: Defeat Jamanra the Risen King
act_2_step_8.description: Find and defeat Jamanra the Risen King, then go down the stairs and to the bottom right of the zone, then back to town.

objectives.text: Find and kill Jamanra the Risen King
objectives.details: Always keep close to the canyon. Cross the canyon three times to find the boss.

objectives.text: Go down the stairs and to the bottom right of the zone, then back to town

act_2_step_9.title: Complete Zarka's Quest and Travel to Keth
act_2_step_9.description: Speak to Zarka and turn in her quest, then use the desert map to go to the Trial of Sekhemas, and finally travel to Keth.

objectives.text: Speak to Zarka and turn in her quest
Use the desert map to go to the Trial of Sekhemas
objectives.details: Take waypoint, then go back to town. You can do the first ascendency trial whenever you feel ready from now on.

objectives.text: Talk to everyone, then use desert map to go to Keth
objectives.details: If it's not possible yet (due to changes in 0.2.0) try to do that at any later point where you are in town

act_2_step_10.title: Defeat Kabala and Find Lost City
act_2_step_10.description: Defeat Kabala, the Constrictor Queen, find the Kabala Clan relic, and locate the exit to The Lost City.

objectives.text: Kill Kabala, the Constrictor Queen
objectives.details: Somewhat on the middle of the zone

objectives.text: Kill snake monsters until you find the Kabala Clan relic
objectives.details: Can also drop in the lost city

objectives.text: Find exit to The Lost City
objectives.details: Always bottom right of the zone, after a big bridge. Take checkpoint, do the rest if not yet done

act_2_step_11.title: Navigate The Lost City to Buried Shrines
act_2_step_11.description: Find the exit and go to The Buried Shrines, optionally finding the golden tomb and ninth treasure.

objectives.text: Find exit and go to The Buried Shrines
Find the golden tomb
Find the ninth treasure of Keth (big gilded beetle)
objectives.details: Has an event name 'the galleria' on the map

act_2_step_12.title: Complete The Buried Shrines and Enter Heart of Keth
act_2_step_12.description: Find the Heart of Keth in The Buried Shrines and complete optional encounters for additional rewards.

objectives.text: Find the Heart of Keth
Find and loot the guarded sarcophagus
Find and complete the Elemental Offering Event
rewards: Random resistance ring (ruby suggested for upcoming boss fight)

act_2_step_13.title: Defeat Azarian and Complete Heart of Keth
act_2_step_13.description: Defeat Azarian the Forsaken Son, interact with the goddess, and complete the ritual to obtain the essence of water.

objectives.text: Kill Azarian the Forsaken Son
Talk to the goddess, loot the cinders, burn the goddess, loot the essence of water

act_2_step_14.title: Speak with Zarka and Travel to Mastodon Badlands
act_2_step_14.description: Talk to Zarka to turn in quests and receive rewards, then use the desert map to travel to Mastodon Badlands.

objectives.text: Talk to Zarka
Use desert map to go to Mastodon Badlands

act_2_step_15.title: Explore Mastodon Badlands and Find Bone Pits
act_2_step_15.description: Find the exit to The Bone Pits, unlock the Well of Souls, and complete optional encounters for additional rewards.

objectives.text: Find the exit to The Bone Pits
Find the Lightless passage to unlock the Well of Souls
Kill hyena enemies until you find the Sun Clan relic
objectives.details: Don't stress it, it's more likely to be found in the bone pits anyways

objectives.text: Find and loot the Shrine of Bones
objectives.details: It's a rare effigy near a checkpoint

act_2_step_16.title: Complete The Bone Pits and Return to Town
act_2_step_16.description: Defeat the zone boss, loot the horn, find the Sun Clan relic, and return to The Ardura Caravan.

objectives.text: Find and kill the zone boss and loot the horn
Kill hyena enemies until you find the Sun Clan relic
Portal back to town

act_2_step_17.title: Speak with Zarka and Travel to Valley of Titans
act_2_step_17.description: Talk to Zarka for rewards, then use the desert map to travel to The Valley of the Titans.

objectives.text: Talk to Zarka
Use desert map to go to The Valley of the Titans

act_2_step_18.title: Complete Valley of Titans and Enter Titan Grotto
act_2_step_18.description: Find and click the three ancient seals, place the two relics in the medallion, and find the exit to Titan Grotto.

objectives.text: Find and click the three ancient seals
Find the medallion and place the two relics in there
objectives.details: The waypoint is here. Choose a buff, it can be changed later at any time

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Titan Grotto

act_2_step_19.title: Complete Titan Grotto and Return to Town
act_2_step_19.description: Find and kill the boss in Titan Grotto, then return to The Ardura Caravan.

objectives.text: Find and kill the boss, then go back to town

act_2_step_20.title: Speak with NPCs and Travel to Deshar
act_2_step_20.description: Talk to Zarka and Asala, use the desert map to travel to The Halani Gates, sound the horn, then travel to Deshar.

objectives.text: Talk to Zarka, then Asala
Use the desert map to travel to The Halani Gates
Go to the front of the caravan and sound the horn
Use the desert map to travel to Deshar

act_2_step_21.title: Complete Deshar and Enter Path of Mourning
act_2_step_21.description: Talk to the abandoned rhoa, find the final letter, and locate the exit to The Path of Mourning.

objectives.text: Talk to the abandoned rhoa BECAUSE IT'S THE RIGHT THING TO DO YOU MONSTER
Find the final letter on a corpse on the ground
objectives.details: Near a big tower on the ground
rewards: 2 skill points on quest turn in

objectives.text: Find the exit to The Path of Mourning
objectives.details: Enter zone, take waypoint, backtrack to Deshar

act_2_step_22.title: Navigate Path of Mourning to Spires of Deshar
act_2_step_22.description: Find the exit to The Spires of Deshar and proceed to the next area.

objectives.text: Find the exit to The Spires of Deshar

act_2_step_23.title: Complete Spires of Deshar and Return to Town
act_2_step_23.description: Find the Sisters of Garukhan, defeat Tor Gul the Defiler, and return to The Ardura Caravan.

objectives.text: Find the Sisters of Garukhan
Find and kill Tor Gul, the Defiler
Portal back to town

act_2_step_24.title: Turn in Final Letter and Travel to The Dreadnought
act_2_step_24.description: Turn in the final letter at Shambrin for skill points, talk to everyone, then travel to The Dreadnought.

objectives.text: Turn in the final letter at Shambrin
objectives.notes: Here you will get the second 2 skill points

objectives.text: Talk to everyone, then use desert map to go to The Dreadnought

act_2_step_25.title: Navigate The Dreadnought to Vanguard
act_2_step_25.description: Find the exit to The Dreadnought Vanguard and proceed to the next area.

objectives.text: Find the exit to The Dreadnought Vanguard

act_2_step_26.title: Defeat Jamara and Return to Town
act_2_step_26.description: Find and defeat Jamara the Abomination in The Dreadnought Vanguard, then return to The Ardura Caravan.

objectives.text: Find and kill Jamara, the Abomination
Portal back to town

act_2_step_27.title: Complete Act 2 and Depart for Act 3
act_2_step_27.description: Leave the Caravan, talk to The Hooded One, return to the Caravan, and talk to Asala to proceed to Act 3.

objectives.text: Leave the Caravan, talk to The Hooded One, go back to the Caravan, Talk to Asala to go to Act 3

act_3_step_1.title: Find Exit to Ziggurat Encampment
act_3_step_1.description: Navigate Sandswept Marsh to find the exit to Ziggurat Encampment, with optional encounters for additional rewards.

objectives.text: Find the exit to Ziggurat Encampment
Find and kill Rootredge
Find the orok campsite and loot the rare basket
objectives.details: Find 'Azak Campfire', kill the two rares

objectives.text: Find the hanging tree and loot the magic corpse

act_3_step_2.title: Talk to Everyone and Exit to Jungle Ruins
act_3_step_2.description: Speak with all NPCs in Ziggurat Encampment and exit into Jungle Ruins.

objectives.text: Talk to everyone and exit into the Jungle Ruins

act_3_step_3.title: Explore Jungle Ruins and Find Exits
act_3_step_3.description: Find exits to Venom Crypts and Infested Barrens, defeat The Mighty Silverfist, and discover the waypoint.

objectives.text: Find the exit to Venom Crypts
objectives.details: Do NOT go through, only take the checkpoint and waypoint.

objectives.text: Find and kill The Mighty Silverfist
Find the exit to Infested Barrens
objectives.details: Do NOT go through, only take the checkpoint

act_3_step_4.title: Explore Infested Barrens and Find Exits
act_3_step_4.description: Discover exits to Chimeral Wetlands, Azak Bog, and Matlan Waterways, then return to Jungle Ruins.

objectives.text: Find the exit to Chimeral Wetlands
objectives.details: Enter zone, take waypoint, backtrack to Infested Barrens

objectives.text: Find the exit to Azak Bog
objectives.details: Enter zone, take waypoint, backtrack to Infested Barrens

objectives.text: Find the exit to Matlan Waterways
objectives.details: Here is the waypoint of barrens itself

objectives.text: From whatever you find last, take the waypoint and portal back to Jungle Ruins

act_3_step_5.title: Enter Venom Crypts
act_3_step_5.description: Enter the Venom Crypts to find the venom phial.

objectives.text: Enter the Venom Crypts

act_3_step_6.title: Find Venom Phial and Return to Town
act_3_step_6.description: Find the corpse for the venom phial, then return to Ziggurat Encampment.

objectives.text: Find the corpse for the venom phial, then go back to town

act_3_step_7.title: Turn in Venom Phial and Travel to Azak Bog
act_3_step_7.description: Turn in the venom phial at Servi for a permanent reward, then travel to Azak Bog.

objectives.text: Go back to town, turn in phial at Servi for a reward
objectives.details: Reward is permanent and cannot be changed later

objectives.text: Go to the Azak Bog

act_3_step_8.title: Complete Azak Bog and Travel to Chimeral Wetlands
act_3_step_8.description: Defeat Ignagduk, optionally complete the Flameskin ritual, then return to town and travel to Chimeral Wetlands.

objectives.text: Find the Flameskin ritual and activate all
objectives.details: It gives 25% fire res and rarity for the rest of the zone. If you don't find it before the boss, don't search for it, but don't skip it if you do find it before the boss

objectives.text: Find and kill Ignagduk
Go back to town and then to Chimeral Wetlands

act_3_step_9.title: Complete Chimeral Wetlands and Enter Machinarium
act_3_step_9.description: Find the temple/trial of chaos, defeat the chimera boss, and enter Juquani's Machinarium.

objectives.text: Find the temple/trial of chaos
objectives.details: Enter zone, take waypoint, waypoint back to Wetlands. Do the trial at any point from now on

objectives.text: Find and kill the chimera boss
objectives.details: Found by following the lefthand border of the zone

objectives.text: Enter Juquani's Machinarium
objectives.details: Behind the chimera boss

act_3_step_10.title: Complete Machinarium and Enter Sanctum
act_3_step_10.description: Find soul cores, open doors, defeat Blackjaw, and proceed to Juquani's Sanctum.

objectives.text: Find the first small soul core, then open the door
objectives.details: Either left or right of Alva

objectives.text: Find two more small soul cores
objectives.details: There are three in total, but only two are needed. The third door is only some gold and a chest.

objectives.text: Find the exit towards Juquani's sanctum
Find and kill Blackjaw
Checkpoint port to the exit, then go to Juquani's Sanctum

act_3_step_11.title: Complete Sanctum and Return to Infested Barrens
act_3_step_11.description: Activate waypoint, talk to Alva, find soul cores, activate generators, defeat Zicoatl, and return to Infested Barrens.

objectives.text: Don't forget to activate the waypoint right after the entry
Talk to Alva
Find two medium soul cores
objectives.details: Soul cores are completely random in the zone

objectives.text: Activate both generators
objectives.details: Generators are always to the left and the right back (relative to where Alva is standing)

objectives.text: Checkpoint back to Alva
objectives.details: Still need to wait until the second soul core arrived at Alva (red lines on the ground)

objectives.text: Kill Zicoatl, Warden of the core and loot the large soul core
Go back to the Infested Barrens waypoint

act_3_step_12.title: Insert Soul Core and Navigate Matlan Waterways
act_3_step_12.description: Insert the large soul core and navigate through Matlan Waterways by activating levers.

objectives.text: Insert the large soul core and go to Matlan Waterways afterwards
Activate every single lever to navigate through the zone, then activate the big one at the end
Port back to town

act_3_step_13.title: Go Downstairs and Enter Drowned City
act_3_step_13.description: Go down the stairs near the well/the hooded one, talk to Alva, and enter the Drowned City.

objectives.text: Go down the stairs near the well / the hooded one
Talk to Alva, enter the Drowned City

act_3_step_14.title: Find Exits to Molten Vault and Apex of Filth
act_3_step_14.description: Discover exits to Molten Vault and Apex of Filth, then proceed to the appropriate zone based on character progression.

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Molten Vault
objectives.details: It is almost always to the north west of the zone. Enter zone, take waypoint, backtrack to the drowned city. Only needed on first character per league

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Apex of Filth
objectives.details: It is almost always to the north east of the zone. Enter zone, take waypoint, backtrack to the drowned city. Backtracking only needed on first character per league

act_3_step_15.title: Enter Molten Vault and Apex of Filth
act_3_step_15.description: Enter both the Molten Vault and Apex of Filth to complete the required progression.

objectives.text: Enter the Molten Vault
objectives.details: Only needed on first character per league

objectives.text: Enter the Apex of Filth

act_3_step_16.title: Complete Molten Vault and Apex of Filth
act_3_step_16.description: Defeat the boss in Molten Vault, talk to Oswald, then defeat the Queen of Filth in Apex of Filth.

objectives.text: Find and kill the boss in Molten Vault, then talk to Oswald back in town
objectives.details: Only needed on first character per league

objectives.text: Enter the Apex of Filth
Find and kill the Queen of Filth, then portal back to town
objectives.details: The zone layout is always a huge spiral, either clockwise or counterclockwise. After you travelled a full 360° of that spiral, you will find the boss

act_3_step_17.title: Enter Temple of Kopec
act_3_step_17.description: Go down the stairs near the well/the hooded one again, and enter the Temple of Kopec.

objectives.text: Go down the stairs near the well / the hooded one again, and enter the Temple of Kopec
objectives.details: Opposite of the drowned city

act_3_step_18.title: Defeat Ketzuli in Temple of Kopec
act_3_step_18.description: Navigate the temple stairs and defeat Ketzuli, High Priest of the Sun.

objectives.text: Go up the stairs twice, then kill Ketzuli, High Priest of the Sun
objectives.details: The stairs are always in either of the corners of the triangle shaped zone. Stay in the shade to not take damage

act_3_step_19.title: Talk to Alva and Travel to Utzaal
act_3_step_19.description: Speak with Alva, ride the elevator up, go through the gateway, then down the stairs to enter Utzaal.

objectives.text: Talk to Alva and ride the elevator up
Go through the gateway, then down the stairs again to enter Utzaal

act_3_step_20.title: Complete Utzaal and Enter Aggorat
act_3_step_20.description: Search for and defeat Viper Napuatzi, optionally find the sacrificial heart, then enter Aggorat.

objectives.text: The sacrificial heart can randomly drop in this zone
objectives.details: If you don't find it in Utzaal, just go to the next zone, do not farm in this zone until it drops

objectives.text: Search and kill Viper Napuatzi
objectives.details: She is always towards the right end of the zone, facing north

objectives.text: Find the exit to Aggorat and enter Aggorat
objectives.details: It is again always to the top right end of the zone, facing north

act_3_step_21.title: Complete Aggorat and Enter Black Chambers
act_3_step_21.description: Follow the voices of the trial of Atziri, find exits and sacrificial table, complete the ritual, then enter Black Chambers.

objectives.text: Follow the voices of the trial of Atziri (on the big plaza), go through to find the next checkpoint
objectives.details: Yes, that means having sound on is beneficial in this zone!

objectives.text: Find the exit towards the Black Chambers
objectives.details: After the big plaza, it is always to the top left end of the zone

objectives.text: Find the Sacrificial table
objectives.details: After the big plaza, it is always to the top right end of the zone

objectives.text: The sacrificial heart can randomly drop in this zone
objectives.details: If you haven't found it until now, continue to kill monsters until you find it

objectives.text: Checkpoint port to the sacrificial table, loot the dagger, place the heart, stab the heart
Checkpoint port to the black chambers, enter the black chambers

act_3_step_22.title: Defeat Doryani and Complete Act 3
act_3_step_22.description: Find and defeat Doryani, Royal Thaumaturge, then speak with him and other NPCs to complete Act 3.

objectives.text: Find and defeat Doryani, Royal Thaumaturge
objectives.details: He is always to the top left or top right of the zone, depending on which angle the entry to the zone is

objectives.text: Go through the Portal to the encampment, speak with Doryani, after the cataclysm speak with him again, then speak with the Sin and eventually Alva to get to Act 4 (Kingsmarch)

act_4_step_1.title: Obtain Boat Charter and Travel to Whakapanu Island
act_4_step_1.description: Speak with key NPCs in Kingsmarch to obtain the boat charter, then select and travel to Whakapanu Island to begin your island exploration.

objectives.text: Speak with required NPCs to get Boat Charter
objectives.details: Talk to Doryani, then to Alva to receive the boat charter. Then talk with Tujen, Ange, Kanu and finally with Makoru to select an island to travel to.

act_4_step_2.title: Explore Whakapanu Island and Enter Singing Caverns
act_4_step_2.description: Search Whakapanu Island for the Singing Caverns entrance while completing optional encounters for additional rewards.

objectives.text: Find and enter the Singing Caverns
objectives.details: Located approximately on the far end of the island compared to the start point.

objectives.text: Find the crabshell cavern and defeat the rare
objectives.details: Can be found alongside the beach part of the zone.

objectives.text: Find the Shark Pit and defeat the Great White One
objectives.details: Can be found across the island on another beach. Trigger the fight by moving close to the water between the gaps in the rock formation.

objectives.text: Find and loot the Petrified Pirate
objectives.details: The pirate corpse is hidden randomly in the zone.

act_4_step_3.title: Complete Singing Caverns and Travel to Shrike Island
act_4_step_3.description: Defeat Diamora in the Chamber of Echoes and complete optional encounters, then proceed to Shrike Island.

objectives.text: Find the Chamber of Echoes and kill Diamora
objectives.details: Find the Chamber of Echoes and kill Diamora. Then return to the ship and go to Shrike Island.

objectives.text: Find the Beckoning Clam
objectives.details: Optional objective within the Singing Caverns.

act_4_step_4.title: Complete Shrike Island and Travel to Abandoned Prison
act_4_step_4.description: Defeat the Scourge of the Skies by destroying corrupted nests, then travel to the Abandoned Prison.

objectives.text: Find the corrupted nests and kill the Scourge of the Skies
objectives.details: Find the corrupted nests and kill the Scourge of the Skies. Then travel to Abandoned Prison.

act_4_step_5.title: Obtain Chapel Key and Enter Solitary Confinement
act_4_step_5.description: Defeat monsters to obtain the Chapel Key, then clear the chapel area and proceed to Solitary Confinement.

objectives.text: Find Chapel Key then the exit to Solitary Confinement
objectives.details: Kill monsters until the Chapel Key drops. Open the Chapel Door and kill the rare and it's minions. Then enter Solitary Confinement.
rewards: 30% increased Mana or Life Recovery from Flasks

act_4_step_6.title: Complete Solitary Confinement and Travel to Isle of Kin
act_4_step_6.description: Defeat The Prisoner and optionally encounter Bronnach the Manhunter for additional rewards, then proceed to Isle of Kin.

objectives.text: Find and kill The Prisoner
objectives.details: Find and kill The Prisoner, then travel to Isle of Kin.

objectives.text: Find and kill Bronnach, the Manhunter
objectives.details: Bronnach is a Rogue Exile

act_4_step_7.title: Complete Isle of Kin and Travel to Volcanic Warrens
act_4_step_7.description: Defeat The Blind Beast in the Primal Arena and complete optional encounters, then proceed to Volcanic Warrens.

objectives.text: Find the Primal Arena and kill The Blind Beast
objectives.details: Find the Primal Arena and kill The Blind Beast, before continuing to Volcanic Warrens.

objectives.text: Find the beast pen encounter and free then kill Mimbok the Enslaved

act_4_step_8.title: Complete Volcanic Warrens and Return to Kingsmarch
act_4_step_8.description: Defeat Krutog, Lord of Kin at the Tyrant's Throne, then speak with Matiki before returning to Kingsmarch.

objectives.text: Find the Tyrant's Throne and kill Krutog, Lord of Kin
objectives.details: Find the Tyrant's Throne and kill Krutog, Lord of Kin. Then speak to Matiki before returning to Kingsmarch.

act_4_step_9.title: Speak with Key NPCs and Travel to Journey's End
act_4_step_9.description: Consult with important NPCs in Kingsmarch to gather information, then travel to Journey's End.

objectives.text: Speak to Important NPCs, then travel to Journey's End
objectives.details: Talk to Missionary Lorandis, Tavakai, Makoru, Ange, Tujen, then Matiki.

act_4_step_10.title: Defeat Captain Hartlin and Obtain Verisium
act_4_step_10.description: Summon Tujen, defeat Captain Hartlin to obtain Verisium, and complete optional encounters before returning to Kingsmarch.

objectives.text: Summon Tujen, then find the Captain's Chair and kill Captain Hartlin to loot the Verisium
objectives.details: After killing Captain Hartlin, return to the beginning (via checkpoint) and talk to Freya.

objectives.text: Find and loot the rigged ship
objectives.details: it will start a timer once you loot the first chest, and then will blow up. any loot not picked up by then will disappear.

act_4_step_11.title: Obtain Verisium Spikes from Dannig
act_4_step_11.description: Speak with Dannig to obtain the Verisium Spikes needed for the upcoming Delirium encounter, then return to Journey's End.

objectives.text: Speak with Dannig to get the Verisium Spikes, then return to Journey's End

act_4_step_12.title: Complete Delirium Encounter and Travel to Eye of Hinekora
act_4_step_12.description: Use Verisium Spikes to impale totems, triggering the Delirium encounter, then defeat Omniphobia and proceed to Eye of Hinekora.

objectives.text: Impale the totems and finish the Delirium Encounter by killing Omniphobia
objectives.details: Speak with Freya again, and empale the totems with the Verisium Spikes. This will start the Delirium encounter.

act_4_step_13.title: Complete Eye of Hinekora and Enter Hall of the Dead
act_4_step_13.description: Navigate through the cavern, complete tests of mettle, find the Silent Hall, and proceed to the Hall of the Dead.

objectives.text: Find and enter the Hall of the Dead
objectives.details: Progress through the cavern and complete each 'test of mettle' encounter, find the Silent Hall and pay your respects, then exit to the Hall of the Dead..

objectives.text: Find the rare chest hidden behind a waterfall
objectives.details: There is a rare chest hidden behind a waterfall.

act_4_step_14.title: Complete Hall of the Dead and Enter Trial of the Ancestors
act_4_step_14.description: Complete the three tests of blank tattoos, defeat Yama the White, and obtain the silver coin to proceed to the Trial of the Ancestors.

objectives.text: Kill Yama the White and enter the Trial of the Ancestors
objectives.details: Find the three tests to look blank tattoos and turn in at their respective totems. Then find Yama's Test to defeat Yama the White. Then loot the silver coin.

act_4_step_15.title: Obtain Tattoo of Hinekora and Travel to Arastas
act_4_step_15.description: Speak with Navali to obtain the Tattoo of Hinekora, then return to the ship and navigate to Arastas.

objectives.text: Talk to Navali and get the Tattoo of Hinekora
objectives.details: Afterwards return to the ship and navigate to Arastas

act_4_step_16.title: Complete Arastas and Travel to The Excavation
act_4_step_16.description: Follow Missionary Lorandis, defeat Torvian, Hand of the Saviour, and complete optional encounters before proceeding to The Excavation.

objectives.text: Talk to Missionary Lorandis, then kill Torvian, Hand of the Saviour, then exit to The Excavation
objectives.details: Follow Missionary Lorandis into the church, then exit again. Destroy the forcefield with any attack or spell. Find the Excavated Pit and kill Torvian, Hand of the Saviour.

objectives.text: Loot the Evening and Morning Bell

act_4_step_17.title: Complete The Excavation and Return to Kingsmarch
act_4_step_17.description: Defeat Benedictus, First Herald of Utopia at the Precursor Forge, witness lore events, and complete optional encounters before returning to Kingsmarch.

objectives.text: Find the Precursor Forge and Defeat Benedictus, First Heral of Utopia
objectives.details: After killing Benedictus, First Heral of Utopia, witness the lore events then return to Kingsmarch.

objectives.text: Find the Excavated cache

act_4_step_18.title: Travel to Ngakanu Island
act_4_step_18.description: Speak with the Hooded One and Rodri to set sail for Ngakanu, the final island in your journey.

objectives.text: Talk to the Hooded One, then to Rodri and set sail for Ngakanu
objectives.details: Travel to Aggorat after completing the three main islands.

act_4_step_19.title: Complete Ngakanu and Enter Heart of the Tribe
act_4_step_19.description: Navigate Ngakanu Island, find the Heart of the Tribe, and complete optional encounters for additional lore.

objectives.text: Find and enter the Heart of the Tribe
Find the Medicine Circle, kill the monsters and talk to Kaimana

act_4_step_20.title: Complete Heart of the Tribe and Return to Kingsmarch
act_4_step_20.description: Find the Sacred Interior, defeat Tavakai in the final boss encounter, then return to Kingsmarch.

objectives.text: Find the Sacred Interior and defeat Tavakai, then return to Kingsmarch

act_4_step_21.title: Begin the Interlude and Travel to The Refuge
act_4_step_21.description: Speak with the Hooded One to begin the interlude sequence and proceed through the linear path to The Refuge, completing Act 4.

objectives.text: Talk to the Hooded One, journey to the The Refuge in the interlude
objectives.details: This is the end of act 4. The interlude is very linear, without optional steps, just clear it in any order.
